channel.title: Tony's Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Year Recap on Tony's Portfolio

item.title: 2022 Recapped
item.description: A look back at another year of progress.
item.summary: Introduction Early this year I tweeted the following; My 2022 goals - finish Demeter - work on at least one cool, low level project with .NET IoT - create and publish a Nuget package that does something useful - build an ORM - join some sort of student research team in the next academic year - learn kubernetes basics — AntoniosBarotsis (@Tony_Barotsis) January 3, 2022 I listed a few things I wanted to work towards over this now past year.
